metadata.description: Kenzie Creative — a marketplace of small, focused plugins for staying on top of your world. Plugins share a directory-level convention (see /contract) so they compose without depending on each other.

plugins.name: intelligence-briefing
plugins.description: v0.3.0 — The external scan: a daily/weekly environmental brief that triages the outside world (news, industry, research, policy, science) into the few items worth your attention. Self-contained; writes a styled HTML brief and keeps its own ledger.

plugins.name: researcher
plugins.description: v1.4.1 — A structured research system: pick a topic, get a phased plan grounded in preliminary research, then work through it together — collecting sources, finding patterns, mapping gaps, synthesizing findings, and auditing every claim before it reaches output. Standalone.

plugins.name: sage
plugins.description: v0.2.0 — The meeting round-up: turns a stream of meeting transcripts into a single living weekly document that surfaces action items, tracks cross-meeting threads, and keeps a forward watch list. Auto-pulls from Read.ai, Fireflies, or Granola; works on any transcript dropped into a source folder for everything else.

plugins.name: strategist
plugins.description: v0.2.0 — A structured strategic-thinking system: take a problem through one repeatable loop — Define, Split, Analyse, Insight, Story, Decide, Act — pulling the right framework from a 70-framework library at each stage, capturing the work in a working record plus a clean reader-facing brief, and pressure-testing the reasoning before you commit. Standalone.
